pages.text: 今天天气特别好，咘咘和小乌龟慢慢在河边玩沙子。慢慢动作很慢，但是堆的沙堡特别漂亮。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a cute white baby bunny and a small cute turtle building a beautiful sandcastle by a river, the turtle carefully placing sand, sunny day, riverside beach, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: "慢慢你堆得好漂亮！"咘咘看着慢慢堆的城堡，也想自己堆一个更大的。咘咘堆啊堆，可是总是塌。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a cute white bunny frustrated with a collapsed sand pile while a small turtle has a perfect sandcastle, the bunny looking jealous, riverside setting, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: 咘咘有点着急，一不小心碰到了慢慢的沙堡——哗啦！慢慢辛苦堆的城堡倒了！
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a cute white bunny accidentally knocking over a beautiful sandcastle, sand collapsing, a small turtle looking shocked and upset, dramatic moment, riverside, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: 慢慢看着自己的城堡变成一堆沙子，眼泪一下子就流出来了。"我堆了好久好久……"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a small cute turtle crying with tears streaming down, looking at destroyed sandcastle, a white bunny standing nearby looking guilty, sad emotional scene, riverside, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: 咘咘心里也很难过，但是不知道该说什么。她跑回家，躲在房间里不出来。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a sad cute white bunny hiding under blankets in a cozy bedroom, looking guilty, through the window you can see the river in distance, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: Sam 爸爸发现咘咘不开心，走进来坐在她身边。"发生什么事了呀？"咘咘把事情告诉了 Sam 爸爸。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a large gentle golden retriever dog sitting on the edge of a bed next to a sad white baby bunny, listening patiently, cozy bedroom, warm lamp light, fatherly love, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: Sam 爸爸说："做错了事情不可怕，可怕的是不愿意说对不起。你觉得慢慢现在心里是什么感受？"咘咘想了想："她一定很难过……"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a golden retriever dog talking wisely to a small white bunny who is thinking with a thoughtful expression, a thought bubble showing a crying turtle, cozy bedroom, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: Tina 妈妈在厨房里烤了一盘小饼干。"咘咘，带上这些饼干去找慢慢吧。一起吃饼干，什么话都好说。"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a kind spotted cow in a cozy kitchen handing a plate of cute star-shaped cookies to a small white bunny, warm kitchen with oven, steam and baking warmth, motherly love, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: 咘咘捧着饼干来到河边。慢慢还在那里，默默地重新堆沙堡。咘咘深呼吸，走过去说："慢慢，对不起。我不是故意弄倒你的城堡的。"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a cute white bunny holding a plate of cookies approaching a small turtle who is rebuilding a sandcastle by the river, the bunny looking sincere and apologetic, soft afternoon light, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: 慢慢抬起头，没有说话。咘咘把饼干放在慢慢面前："这是 Tina 妈妈烤的，给你吃。我可以帮你一起重新堆吗？"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a white bunny placing cookies in front of a small turtle, the turtle looking up with conflicted emotions, cookies on the sand, riverside, gentle warm light, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: 慢慢看了看饼干，又看了看咘咘，慢慢地笑了。"好吧……你帮我扶着这边，不要再碰倒了哦。"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a small turtle smiling gently at a white bunny, both starting to build a sandcastle together, cookies beside them, friendship rebuilding, warm riverside scene, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: 两个人一起堆了一座比之前更大更漂亮的城堡！NOMI 路过看到了："哇！这个城堡好厉害！是你们两个一起堆的吗？"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a white bunny and turtle proudly showing off an amazing large sandcastle, a raccoon in blue sweater looking impressed, the sandcastle is elaborate and beautiful, riverside golden hour, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: 咘咘和慢慢一起笑着说："对呀！两个人一起比一个人好！"NONO 飞过来在城堡顶上插了一面小旗子。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a red bird placing a tiny flag on top of a beautiful sandcastle, white bunny and turtle laughing together, raccoon clapping, celebratory joyful scene, riverside, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: 回家的路上，Sam 爸爸问："今天学到什么了？"咘咘说："说对不起虽然有点难，但说了以后，就会变得更好！而且两个人一起做事比一个人更开心！"Sam 爸爸摸了摸咘咘的头："我的咘咘长大了。"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a golden retriever dog patting a happy white baby bunny on the head while walking home at sunset, proud fatherly moment, warm golden path, trees along the road, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: 💡 咘咘今天学到了：做错了事情不要害怕，勇敢地说"对不起"。真心道歉，朋友会原谅你的。而且两个人一起合作，可以做出比一个人更厉害的东西！
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, white bunny and turtle sitting together on the sandcastle they built, all friends around - raccoon red bird golden retriever cow - warm group scene with beautiful sandcastle, sunset riverside, educational ending, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition
